violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -No sanitation bucket was ready when the inspection began. When a sanitation bucket was put together the chlorine concentration was far too high. Discussed cutting back on the bleach concentration with the owner.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Some food products are passed due on their dates. (Baked Beans, Milk, Mayo)

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Reach in cooler used for cold storage in kitchen has broken seals with tape in need of replacement.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
